name: S-3 --emit writes a JSON coverage matrix with sources tree keyed by source-id per the architecture path
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r-1, provenance: [{source: google-jsguide, section_id: "5.2"}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree tree --emit matrix.json 2>err.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("matrix.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.sources&&j.sources["google-jsguide"]?0:1)' && echo emitted 1>&2
